notes: Overwrite the »mprapi.dll« to native. I’ve used protonfixes with a local gamefix: util.winedll_override('mprapi', 'x'). I will create a pull request for protonfixes and merge it.
title: PixARK

notes:
The Game runs perfectly after a small tweak.
The game currently needs a 64bit copy of mprapi.dll from a Windows 7 Install placed in the same folder as shootergame.exe and mprapi needs to be set to native in winecfg. Which solves the following issue, "wine: Call from 0x7b45317c to unimplemented function mprapi.dll.MprConfigServerConnect, aborting".
title: PixARK
